description:
Legal record (#35) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 5r of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the middle third of Adar II 5453 CE, which is 1693 CE. 

(Document #35) Investment partnership between Avraham Dūshan(?) (דושן) and the widow Marḥaba bt. Shelomo ha-Levi. Marḥaba had been married to her paternal uncle Ḥayyīm, based on the phrase following her initial patronymics: אלמנת אחיו המ[נו]ח כה׳׳ר חיים נ׳׳ע (the damaged word המנוח is confirmed in the subsequent court register entry). The language of origin for the surname (?)דושן is unknown– if this was an Ashkenazi member of the community then the French surname Duchêne is not out of the question (chêne = oak tree). MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#35) בפנקס בית דין בקהיר (T-S K22.27, דף 5r); בעברית; אדר ב' ה'תנ"ג (1693 לספירה); שותפות השקעה בין אברהם דוּשָׁן(?) לאלמנה מרחבה בת שלמה הלוי; מרחבה נישאה לדודה מצד אביה חיים
